articles.title: Brookline’s regal Webber-Bouve Mansion hits market for $4.3m
articles.description:
The 2.5-story Queen Anne house built in 1885 is an extravagant and dramatic showcase of late Victorian architecture.

The post Brookline’s regal Webber-Bouve Mansion hits market for $4.3m appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brookline's Webber-Bouve Mansion is listed for sale at $4.3 million.
The 2.5-story mansion, built in 1885, showcases late Victorian architecture.
Potential buyers could influence local real estate market dynamics in Brookline.
